beneficialData.name: Staphylococcus epidermidis
beneficialData.relevance: 额头优势共生菌，抑制致病菌黏附，强化皮肤免疫屏障

beneficialData.cnName: 痤疮丙酸杆菌（有益菌株）
beneficialData.name: Cutibacterium acnes
beneficialData.relevance: 调节皮脂代谢，抑制有害菌增殖

beneficialData.name: Corynebacterium kroppenstedtii
beneficialData.relevance: 提升微生态多样性，调控局部炎症

beneficialData.name: Corynebacterium striatum
beneficialData.relevance: 促进角质代谢，增强屏障功能

beneficialData.name: Corynebacterium urealyticum
beneficialData.relevance: 调节皮肤pH值，抑制耐酸致病菌

beneficialData.name: Staphylococcus haemolyticus
beneficialData.relevance: 竞争性抑制金黄色葡萄球菌定植

beneficialData.name: Staphylococcus hominis
beneficialData.relevance: 调节皮肤微生态平衡，分泌抗菌代谢物

beneficialData.name: Staphylococcus lugdunensis
beneficialData.relevance: 分泌抗菌肽，抑制致病真菌/细菌

conditionalPathogenData.name: Klebsiella pneumoniae
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 潮湿环境定植，诱发局部炎症

conditionalPathogenData.name: Escherichia coli
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 外源污染后定植，刺激皮肤炎症反应

conditionalPathogenData.name: Pseudomonas aeruginosa
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 免疫下降时诱发继发性皮肤感染

conditionalPathogenData.cnName: 单核细胞增生李斯特菌
conditionalPathogenData.name: Listeria monocytogenes
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 免疫低下人群易感染，引发红斑脓疱

conditionalPathogenData.name: Enterococcus faecalis
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 创面常见感染菌，伴随化脓反应

conditionalPathogenData.name: Citrobacter freundii
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 潮湿环境增殖，关联皮肤异味

conditionalPathogenData.name: Staphylococcus aureus
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 皮肤破损时引发毛囊炎、脓疱疮

conditionalPathogenData.name: Clostridium perfringens
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 创伤后引发坏死性皮肤感染

conditionalPathogenData.name: Proteus mirabilis
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 皮肤溃疡时感染，产生异味代谢物

conditionalPathogenData.name: Proteus vulgaris
conditionalPathogenData.relevance: 接触污染后定植，分泌毒性代谢物

harmfulData.name: Acinetobacter baumannii
harmfulData.relevance: 多重耐药菌，创面感染风险高

harmfulData.name: Streptococcus pyogenes
harmfulData.relevance: 引发化脓、蜂窝织炎，具有传染性

harmfulData.name: Candida albicans
harmfulData.relevance: 诱发念珠菌性皮炎，伴红斑瘙痒

harmfulData.name: Candida parapsilosis
harmfulData.relevance: 皮肤破损时定植，诱发局部红肿

harmfulData.name: Candida tropicalis
harmfulData.relevance: 耐热性强，夏季易引发额头真菌性炎症

harmfulData.name: Streptococcus agalactiae
harmfulData.relevance: 引发蜂窝织炎、脓疱疮，侵犯暴露部位
